description:
This quiz assesses JavaScript proficiency by testing knowledge of language features ranging from ES2015 to ES2022 through multiple‑choice questions. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty, offering a casual, encouraging tone that invites learners to prove their skills without any registration hurdles.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 updates, Modern JavaScript syntax and semantics, Module imports and component usage
Audience: Developers and students with basic to intermediate JavaScript experience who want to gauge and improve their understanding of recent ECMAScript standards.
